seo.title: Ethan & Sons Electricians | Addison, TX | Electrical Services
seo.description: Ethan & Sons Electricians in Addison, TX offers professional electrical services including residential and commercial wiring, panel upgrades, lighting, and emergency repairs. Call (469) 425-8874.

hero.headline: Professional Electrical Services You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From minor repairs to full rewiring, our licensed electricians deliver safe, reliable, and code-compliant solutions for your home or business.

featureSections.title: Safe & Efficient Home Electrical Solutions
featureSections.body: Your home's electrical system is its nervous system. We provide comprehensive residential services from outlet repairs to full panel upgrades, ensuring safety and efficiency for your family.
bullets: Wiring for new construction or remodels
featureSections.cardBody: Older panels can be a fire hazard. We replace outdated fuse boxes with modern circuit breakers, increasing capacity and safety.

featureSections.title: Keep Your Business Powered & Productive
featureSections.body: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electricians ensure your business runs smoothly with minimal disruption. We handle everything from new construction wiring to emergency repairs.
featureSections.cardBody: Upgrade to LED lighting and smart controls to reduce energy bills by up to 60%. We'll design a custom solution for your facility.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection. Our team undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest codes and technologies.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We provide detailed upfront estimates so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait. We offer same-day appointments and 24/7 emergency response to get your power back on quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Workmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every job is backed by our satisfaction guarantee. We take pride in clean, precise work that meets the highest standards of safety and durability.

testimonials.quote: Ethan & Sons rewired our entire home and did an amazing job. They were professional, on time, and left everything spotless. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We had a major electrical issue at our office and they came out within an hour. Fixed the problem quickly and at a fair price. Great service!
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: I've used them for multiple projects now. They are reliable, knowledgeable, and always go the extra mile. My go-to electrician in Addison.
testimonials.author: Linda K.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free estimate or emergency service. We're here to help!

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, Ethan & Sons Electricians offers a full range of electrical services for residential and commercial clients in Addison, TX. Our licensed electricians deliver safe, reliable, and code-compliant work every time.

services.title: Residential Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Complete electrical solutions for your home, from outlet repairs to panel upgrades.
services.longDescription: We keep your home safe and powered. Our residential electricians handle everything from troubleshooting flickering lights to installing new circuits for your home office or kitchen remodel. We prioritize safety and efficiency in every project.
benefits: Enhanced home safety with code-compliant wiring
Increased property value with modern electrical systems
Energy savings with LED upgrades and smart controls
Peace of mind with 24/7 emergency support

process.title: Inspection & Assessment
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your electrical system to identify issues and recommend the best solutions tailored to your needs.

process.title: Transparent Quote
process.description: You receive a detailed, no-obligation estimate with a clear breakdown of costs and timeline.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our licensed electricians perform the work efficiently, with minimal disruption, and clean up afterward.

faqs.question: How do I know if my panel needs upgrading?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent breaker trips, dimming lights, or using knob-and-tube wiring. If your home is over 25 years old, an inspection is recommended.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on your work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee and manufacturer warranties on parts.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for businesses, from wiring to energy-efficient upgrades.
services.longDescription: We understand that every minute of downtime impacts your bottom line. Our commercial electricians provide fast, professional service for offices, retail spaces, warehouses, and more. We design and install systems that are safe, efficient, and scalable.
benefits: Minimized downtime with rapid response and repair
Reduced energy costs with LED retrofits and smart controls
Compliance with all commercial electrical codes
Custom solutions for new construction or renovations

process.title: Consultation & Planning
process.description: We discuss your business needs and conduct a site survey to design an electrical plan that fits your operations.

process.title: Detailed Proposal
process.description: You receive a comprehensive proposal with scope, timeline, and pricing, so there are no surprises.

process.title: Efficient Execution
process.description: Our team works around your schedule to complete the project with minimal disruption to your business.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency services for businesses?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide 24/7 emergency response for commercial clients to get your operations back online quickly.

faqs.question: Can you help with energy efficiency upgrades?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in LED lighting retrofits, occupancy sensors, and energy management systems that reduce your utility bills.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency service for power outages, sparking outlets, and other urgent issues.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies can happen at any time. Whether it's a sudden power outage, a sparking outlet, or a tripping breaker that won't reset, our team is on call 24/7 to respond quickly and safely. We prioritize emergencies to protect your property and family.
benefits: Fast response times, often within 60 minutes
Licensed electricians equipped for any emergency
Temporary fixes to restore power immediately

process.title: Immediate Dispatch
process.description: Call our emergency line and we'll dispatch the nearest available electrician to your location.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: We quickly diagnose the issue and explain the situation, including any immediate safety steps.

process.title: Safe Resolution
process.description: We perform the necessary repairs to restore power and ensure your system is safe.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses a safety risk, such as exposed wires, sparking outlets, burning smells, or complete power loss.

faqs.question: How much does an emergency call cost?
faqs.answer: We offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. The cost depends on the time and materials needed, but we always provide an estimate before work begins.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Custom lighting solutions for indoor and outdoor spaces, from accent to security lighting.
services.longDescription: Great lighting transforms your space. We design and install custom lighting systems that enhance ambiance, improve functionality, and increase security. From recessed lighting and chandeliers to landscape and motion-sensor lights, we bring your vision to life.
benefits: Improved safety with well-lit pathways and entrances
Energy savings with LED and smart lighting

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your goals and preferences, and create a lighting plan that fits your style and budget.

process.title: Fixture Selection
process.description: We help you choose from a wide range of fixtures and bulbs, including energy-efficient options.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our electricians install all fixtures, wiring, and controls with precision and care.

faqs.question: Can you install outdoor lighting for security?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install motion-sensor lights, floodlights, and smart outdoor lighting systems to enhance security.

faqs.question: Do you work with custom fixtures?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can install any fixture you provide, or we can source high-quality options for you.

about.headline: Your Trusted Addison Electricians Since 1995
about.mission: Our mission is to provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to the Addison community, treating every home and business as if it were our own.
story: Ethan & Sons Electricians was founded in 1995 by Master Electrician Ethan Miller with a simple vision: deliver exceptional electrical work with honesty and integrity. What started as a one-man operation has grown into a family-run business serving thousands of satisfied customers across Addison and the surrounding areas. We believe in building lasting relationships through quality workmanship and transparent communication.

Today, our team of licensed electricians continues that tradition. We invest in ongoing training and the latest tools to ensure we meet the evolving needs of our community. Whether it's a small repair or a large commercial project, we approach every job with the same commitment to excellence. We're proud to be your neighbors and your go-to electricians.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job is performed to the highest standards to protect you and your property.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work. Honest assessments, fair pricing, and no shortcuts.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to be part of the Addison community. We support local events and give back whenever we can.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We strive for perfection in every detail, from the initial consultation to the final cleanup.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project or need emergency service? Contact us today and we'll respond promptly.
